scenario: Sign in with email and password
steps: 1. Navigate to /login; 2. Enter valid email and password; 3. Click Sign In
expected_result: User is authenticated and redirected to /dashboard

steps: 1. Navigate to /login; 2. Click Sign in with Google; 3. Complete Google OAuth flow
expected_result: User is authenticated and redirected to /dashboard or /onboarding (first time)

steps: 1. Navigate to /login; 2. Enter invalid email/password; 3. Click Sign In
expected_result: Error message displayed; no session created

steps: 1. Sign in; 2. Inspect cookies in browser devtools
expected_result: Session cookie has HttpOnly=true and Secure=true flags

steps: 1. Sign in; 2. Wait 7+ days (or manipulate cookie expiry); 3. Make API request
expected_result: Session rejected; user redirected to /login

steps: 1. Sign in; 2. Click Logout; 3. Attempt to access /dashboard
expected_result: Session cookie cleared; user redirected to /login; subsequent API calls with old cookie rejected

scenario: REP cannot access another rep's earnings
steps: 1. Sign in as REP; 2. GET /api/earnings?userId=<other_rep_id>
expected_result: 403 Forbidden returned; no data leaked

steps: 1. Sign in as REP; 2. GET /api/admin/orgs
expected_result: 403 Forbidden

steps: 1. Sign in as FINANCE; 2. PATCH /api/plans/:id with changes
expected_result: 403 Forbidden

scenario: MANAGER can view only direct reports
steps: 1. Sign in as MANAGER; 2. GET /api/earnings?userId=<non-report-rep-id>
expected_result: 403 Forbidden; cannot see non-reports data

scenario: Org A cannot access Org B data
steps: 1. Sign in as Org A ADMIN; 2. GET /api/transactions (which should only return Org A transactions)
expected_result: Only Org A transactions returned; no Org B data leaked

steps: 1. Sign in as Org A ADMIN; 2. GET /api/plans/<orgB_plan_id>
expected_result: 404 or 403; no Org B plan data returned

scenario: Create a flat rate commission plan
steps: 1. Sign in as ADMIN; 2. Navigate to /plans/new; 3. Complete wizard: name + type COMMISSION + 5% flat rate + 3 participants + monthly period; 4. Submit
expected_result: Plan created with status DRAFT; all rule config saved correctly
Tiered config saved; validation passes; preview shows correct tier table

scenario: Add a clawback rule to a plan
steps: 1. Edit a plan in DRAFT; 2. Add clawback rule: customer cancels within 90 days = 100% recovery
expected_result: Clawback rule saved with correct config JSON; displayed in plan summary

scenario: Plan cannot be published without approval
steps: 1. Create a plan in DRAFT; 2. Attempt to click Publish (if not yet approved)
expected_result: Publish button disabled with tooltip explaining approval required

steps: 1. Admin submits plan for approval (DRAFT → REVIEW); 2. Approver approves (REVIEW → APPROVED); 3. Admin publishes (APPROVED → PUBLISHED)
expected_result: Each status transition logged in AuditLog; email notification sent at each step

scenario: Approver receives email notification on plan submission
steps: 1. Admin submits plan for approval
expected_result: Approver receives email within 2 minutes with link to the plan

scenario: Rep cannot view earnings until plan acknowledged (when required)
steps: 1. Admin publishes plan with acknowledgment required; 2. Rep logs into portal; 3. Attempts to view earnings
expected_result: Full-screen acknowledgment prompt shown; earnings detail hidden until acknowledged

scenario: Acknowledgment recorded with timestamp and IP
steps: 1. Rep acknowledges a plan
expected_result: PlanAcknowledgment record created with acknowledgedAt (UTC)

scenario: Create an individual quota for a rep
steps: 1. ADMIN creates quota for user X for period 2026-06 for AUD 500000
expected_result: Quota saved; visible to rep in portal; used in next calculation run

steps: 1. ADMIN uploads CSV with 10 quota rows; 2. Reviews field mapping; 3. Confirms import
expected_result: 10 quotas created; ImportJob status COMPLETED; each quota queryable by API

steps: 1. ADMIN uploads a CSV with 50 valid transaction rows; 2. Confirms import
expected_result: 50 transactions created; ImportJob COMPLETED with processedRows=50 errorRows=0

steps: 1. ADMIN uploads CSV with 3 invalid rows (missing amount, wrong currency); 2. Confirms import
expected_result: Valid rows imported; 3 errors reported in ImportJob.errors with row number and field

steps: 1. Import CSV with transaction externalId=SF-001; 2. Re-import same CSV with onDuplicate=skip
expected_result: Second import skips SF-001; ImportJob shows 0 new rows created

steps: 1. Import CSV with a cell value starting with =SUM(1+1)
expected_result: Cell stored with leading single-quote; no formula execution; exported CSV also safe

steps: 1. Create plan: 5% flat rate; 2. Create quota AUD 1M; 3. Import transaction AUD 200K; 4. Run calculation
expected_result: Earnings = AUD 10000 (5% × 200K); attainment = 20%; audit trail shows each step

steps: 1. Create tiered progressive plan (0-50%=0%, 51-100%=5%); 2. Quota AUD 1M; 3. Import AUD 800K transaction; 4. Run calculation
expected_result: Earnings = AUD 15000 (0% × 0-500K, 5% × 300K); attainment 80%; audit trail correct

steps: 1. Plan with 5% rate + 2x accelerator above 100%; 2. Quota AUD 500K; 3. Import AUD 600K; 4. Run
expected_result: Earnings = AUD 25K for 0-100% (5% × 500K) + AUD 10K for 100-120% (5% × 2 × 100K) = AUD 35K

steps: 1. Plan with 5% rate + hard cap AUD 20K; 2. Quota AUD 1M; 3. Import AUD 1M; 4. Run
expected_result: Earnings capped at AUD 20K (not AUD 50K); audit trail shows cap rule applied

scenario: Split credit allocates correctly to two reps
steps: 1. Transaction AUD 100K with 60% to Rep A and 40% to Rep B; 2. Plan: 5% flat; 3. Run calculation
expected_result: Rep A earns AUD 3K (5% × 60K); Rep B earns AUD 2K (5% × 40K); both in earnings records

steps: 1. Rep earned commission on deal in Month 1; 2. Customer cancels in Month 2 (within 90-day clawback window); 3. Month 2 calculation run
expected_result: Clawback amount deducted from Month 2 net earnings; audit trail shows clawback rule

steps: 1. Transaction USD 100K; org base currency AUD; rate 1.5; 2. Plan in AUD; 3. Run calculation
expected_result: amountBase = AUD 150K; commission calculated on AUD 150K; exchange rate and date stored on transaction

scenario: Audit trail is complete and traceable
steps: 1. Run any calculation; 2. View earnings record audit trail
expected_result: Every rule that fired is listed with inputs
priority: and rule config; can trace from gross → net

steps: 1. Import transaction for past period; 2. Run retroactive calculation
expected_result: New EarningsRecord version created; original record preserved; delta record shows old vs new; AuditLog entry created

steps: 1. Rep with no quota set for the period; 2. Has transactions; 3. Run calculation
expected_result: Exception flagged in CalculationRun; EarningsRecord created with attainmentPct=null; flat rules still fire if applicable

scenario: Full payment run lifecycle (DRAFT → APPROVED → EXPORTED → PAID)
steps: 1. FINANCE creates payment run; 2. Reviews exceptions; 3. Approves; 4. Exports to Xero format; 5. Marks as PAID
expected_result: Each status transition recorded; AuditLog entries at each step; correct rep payments in run

scenario: Payment hold prevents inclusion in run
steps: 1. FINANCE places hold on Rep X's payment; 2. Create payment run
expected_result: Rep X's payment excluded from run; hold reason shown in Finance view

scenario: Cannot approve run with wrong role
steps: 1. Sign in as MANAGER; 2. POST /api/payments/runs/:id/approve
expected_result: 403 Forbidden

scenario: Rep submits dispute and manager receives notification
steps: 1. REP navigates to earnings; 2. Submits dispute with description and category; 3. Uploads evidence
expected_result: Dispute created with DIS-XXXX reference; OPEN status; manager receives email notification within 2 minutes

steps: 1. Submit dispute; 2. View dispute detail
expected_result: slaDeadline = 5 business days from submission (configurable); countdown shown in UI

steps: 1. REP submits 11 disputes in one day
expected_result: 11th submission returns 429 Too Many Requests with message

steps: 1. Submit dispute with evidence file; 2. Get signed URL for evidence; 3. Access URL after 1 hour
expected_result: Signed URL expired and returns 403; evidence still accessible via fresh signed URL

scenario: Rep sees their own earnings on portal dashboard
steps: 1. Sign in as REP; 2. Navigate to /portal
expected_result: Current period attainment gauge
priority: next payment estimate all displayed correctly

scenario: Rep can drill into deal-level earnings detail
steps: 1. REP navigates to /portal; 2. Clicks on a specific deal
expected_result: Deal detail shows: deal name
notes: commission earned; View Calculation opens audit trail

steps: 1. REP uses what-if: models closing an additional AUD 100K deal; 2. Result shown
expected_result: Projected earnings match a manual calculation against the same plan rules and current attainment

steps: 1. Sign in as MANAGER with 5 direct reports; 2. Navigate to /dashboard
expected_result: Only 5 direct reports shown; other reps in org not visible

steps: 1. Manager has CRM integration active; 2. Views team forecast tab
expected_result: Pipeline deals shown with weighted close probability; projected commission expense calculated

steps: 1. Check isSuperAdmin('prakashmnair@gmail.com') in application code
expected_result: Returns true regardless of database role value; hardcoded in code

scenario: SUPER_ADMIN cannot revoke their own superadmin access
steps: 1. Sign in as SUPER_ADMIN; 2. POST /api/admin/users/:own_id/revoke-superadmin
expected_result: 400 Bad Request returned; self-revoke blocked

steps: 1. Sign in as SUPER_ADMIN; 2. POST /api/admin/users/:id/impersonate without reason
expected_result: 400 Bad Request; reason field required

steps: 1. SUPER_ADMIN impersonates a user; 2. Check AuditLog
expected_result: AuditLog entry with actionType=IMPERSONATE; actorId=super_admin; entityId=target_user; reason stored

scenario: API key shown once on creation then not retrievable
steps: 1. ADMIN creates API key; 2. Note the key; 3. Navigate away; 4. View key list again
expected_result: Only keyPrefix shown in list; full key not visible; cannot be retrieved

steps: 1. Create API key; 2. Revoke key; 3. Make API call with revoked key within 1 second
expected_result: 401 Unauthorized returned immediately

steps: 1. Create sc_test_ key; 2. POST /api/v1/transactions with sandbox key
expected_result: Transaction created in sandbox only; production data unaffected

steps: 1. Register webhook; 2. Trigger a transaction.created event
expected_result: Webhook POST contains X-Webhook-Signature header; signature verifiable with shared secret

scenario: Failed webhook retried 3 times with backoff
steps: 1. Register webhook to an endpoint that returns 500; 2. Trigger event
expected_result: 3 delivery attempts: immediate
priority: 5min; then marked failed; delivery log shows all attempts

scenario: Exchange rate locked at close date
steps: 1. Transaction closed on 2026-06-01 at rate 1.5; 2. Rate changes to 1.6 on 2026-06-15; 3. Run calculation on 2026-06-20
expected_result: Commission calculated using rate 1.5 (close date rate); not 1.6; exchangeRateDate on transaction is 2026-06-01

steps: 1. Call maskEmail('john.doe@example.com')
expected_result: Returns 'jo***@***.com' (first 2 chars + TLD visible)

scenario: Email address not logged in server logs
steps: 1. Perform a login; 2. Check Cloud Logging for the request
expected_result: No email address visible in log output; [REDACTED] or entity ID only

scenario: Admin view masks PII by default
steps: 1. Sign in as ADMIN; 2. Navigate to user list
expected_result: Email addresses masked; reveal toggle visible

scenario: REP can export their own commission statement as PDF
steps: 1. REP navigates to Statements; 2. Downloads June 2026 statement
expected_result: PDF downloaded with correct period

steps: 1. ADMIN exports earnings CSV where a rep's name starts with =
expected_result: Cell stored as '=... (with leading single quote); no formula executes in Excel

steps: 1. Sign in; 2. Inspect Set-Cookie header
expected_result: Cookie has: HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict

scenario: Input HTML sanitised on all text fields
steps: 1. Submit a plan with <script>alert(1)</script> in the name field
expected_result: Script tag stripped; no XSS; raw text stored; no execution

scenario: SUPER_ADMIN cannot be assigned via regular UI
steps: 1. ADMIN attempts to update a user's role to SUPER_ADMIN via the user edit form
expected_result: Validation error; SUPER_ADMIN not in the selectable role list; API also rejects the value

scenario: Calculation run for 10K transactions completes in under 5 minutes
steps: 1. Seed 10K transactions; 2. Trigger full calculation run; 3. Measure duration
expected_result: Run completes in < 5 minutes; no timeout; EarningsRecords correct

scenario: Earnings list API returns first page in < 500ms
steps: 1. GET /api/v1/earnings?page=1&limit=50 with 100K rows in DB
expected_result: Response within 500ms p95; pagination headers correct

steps: 1. Tab through all pages; 2. Activate every button and link by keyboard
expected_result: No interactive element unreachable by keyboard; focus visible

steps: 1. Inspect all icon-only interactive elements in DOM
expected_result: All have aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

steps: 1. Create clawback rule for a plan assigned to a California-based rep
expected_result: Warning displayed: 'This clawback rule may not be enforceable for California participants. Review with legal counsel.'

scenario: Acknowledgment stored with ISO 8601 UTC timestamp
steps: 1. Rep acknowledges plan
expected_result: PlanAcknowledgment.acknowledgedAt stored as ISO 8601 UTC string

scenario: Admin completes full onboarding wizard in < 30 minutes with sample data
steps: 1. New account signup; 2. Complete 6-step wizard using sample data; 3. Click Run calculation
expected_result: First calculation run completes; success state shown; timer stays under 30 minutes

scenario: Welcome email sent within 2 minutes of signup
steps: 1. Complete signup; 2. Check inbox
expected_result: Welcome email received within 2 minutes

steps: 1. Admin deletes a user account; 2. Check all records
expected_result: User.email set to [deleted]; User.name set to [deleted]; AuditLog.actorEmail set to [deleted]; EarningsRecords retained with userId
